combined_text_for_llm: Tutu (clothing) "For other uses, see Tutu (disambiguation). Alexandra Ansanelli wearing a pancake tutu The modern tutu is a dress worn as a costume in a ballet performance, often with attached bodice. [1] It may be made of tarlatan, muslin, silk, tulle, gauze, or nylon. Modern tutus have two basic types: the Romant
